prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, a masculine guild crafter in a rolled-sleeve apron with ash-marked gloves and a feminine adventurer in reinforced leather armor and a bright scarf; the crafter steadies a damaged shield on the wooden workbench while the adventurer carefully guides a safe repair tool, cooperative hands, warm forge light, no sparks, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous forge shot; the feminine adventurer taps the final harmless repair mark on the shield while the masculine crafter maintains a steady grip, friendly teamwork, clear tool motion, warm ambient lighting, consistent character appearance, no text, no watermark.
